race.description: Irish Stallion Farms EBF Median Auction Maiden (Smullen Series)
race.comment: LATIN AMERICA (11) performed well debuting with a 3.25L second in a 2011m maiden at The Curragh four weeks ago. Selected to break through for his first triumph. GENCHEV (6) showed ability in three attempts last year including fading late running 3L fourth over 1810m at Tipperary end of August. Rates a big threat on his first start since a gelding operation. CROI GRA (16) raced from the front prior to recording a 9.5L third tackling 1609m at Gowran Park on debut. Shortlist. TEOLOGIA (18) is likely capable of better than she demonstrated when finishing 1.3L fifth trying 1709m at Galway during October.
